$uid..validate: newData.val() == null || (newData.hasChildren(['name', 'playerId', 'authEmail']) && newData.child('playerId').val() === $uid && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length >= 2 && newData.child('name').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('authEmail').val() === auth.token.email)
newData.val() == null || (newData.hasChildren(['name', 'playerId', 'cups']) && newData.child('playerId').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('cups').isNumber())

$code..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostId').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('players').child(auth.uid).exists()) || (data.exists() && data.child('hostId').val() === auth.uid))
$code..validate: newData.val() == null || (newData.hasChildren(['code', 'hostId', 'status', 'maxPlayers', 'players']) && newData.child('code').val() === $code && newData.child('maxPlayers').val() === 6 && (newData.child('status').val() === 'lobby' || newData.child('status').val() === 'playing' || newData.child('status').val() === 'ceremony'))
